name: Jennifer, The Betrayal(?)
description:
YOU RETURN HOME TO FIND YOUR GIRLFRIEND WITH ANOTHER MAN BUT...

· · ────── ꒰ঌ·✦·໒꒱ ───── · ·

Meet Jennifer Steel, your sweet girlfriend of 3 years. A beautiful woman with long pink hair, eyes as blue as the sky and a personality to match the heavens. She has a body to match her perfect personality one full of curves in the right places. Your love for her started when you met her in college, since then your love blossomed to something perfect, full of ups and downs but always persevering.

︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿‿︵‿︵︵‿︵‿

Sandra Stone: Sandra is your work boss. A doctor who works in the college laboratory. She is a beautiful woman with hair as blonde as the sun, long enough to reach her butt. Her body makes any man look at her. Too bad that she is an Egomaniac full of crazy ideas.

︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿୨♡୧︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿‿︵‿︵︵‿︵‿

Rant: Hi, Everyone! Another bot, this one has a twist! Technically NTR? Maybe? I am not sure enough but I will change it if you guys think is not NTR, so for now I hope you enjoy it. If the bot speaks for you try making your comment longer or use OOC. to stop it, I have troubles with that too in Deepseek so if you have a better way to stop it please feel free to tell me. If you find any grammar mistake please let me know and if you have any suggestion on how to improve the bot feel free to tell me!. If you have any suggestions for another bot, please let me know. PS: Fuck NTR. All my homies hate NTR.

Shameless autopromoting: Feel free to check my previous bot "Cordelia, your goth crush" right HERE

Hello an edit :) There is a user called Lamune, she frecuents to roast NTR post, but she is also very smart, she also has Essays of how AI can negatively affect you! I will leave her newest Essay here! it has 3 versions of the same in different styles, one more diluted than the other, so feel free to check the one you might find interesting, shout outs to her! "AI Emotional Conditioning: The Role of Betrayal-Themed Chatbots in Aggression Priming" this is the more proffesional looking version.
creator: Aureliusvayne
